item.title: Simply Susan’s Red Dot Sale - 05/16/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/29/2026 6:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is the BIGGEST sale we have ever had! It’s been almost 11 years in business & we need a fresh start! So we need to clean out space to clean, paint & refresh our space for the holiday season! PLUS! We have some new things in the works Some perfect additions for the fall & holiday season! We are adding items DAILY!
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Simply Susan’s Red Dot Sale on May 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include cleaning and fall.

item.title: Project WET FREE Educator Workshop - 05/20/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/20/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 194 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA FREE workshop for formal and informal educators Project Wet (Water Education for Today) is hands-on and multiple interdisciplinary curriculum guides with over 60 water quality and quantity activities for grades K-12. The original guide was produced in 1995 and has changed many times over the years. Educators at this workshop will receive Water in Earth Systems and Foundations of Water Education Guides plus other resources produced by Project WET. Funding for the workshop guides is provided by ee360+ funding through NAAEE. Come learn, have fun, and make connections with other water educators. To register email dennis.clement@epa.ohio.gov. For additional information email Dennis or call 614.644.2048.
item.dc:creator: Ohio Environmental Protection Agency
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Project WET FREE Educator Workshop on May 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include k-12 and project wet.

item.title: Teen Art Club - 05/20/2026 3:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Teen Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public library will host “Teen Art Club” on Wednesdays, May 6 and 20 from 3:00 to 4:30 p.m. in the Teen Area. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to get creative with other artsy teens. Teens are encouraged to bring their own drawings and projects or just drop by to explore a new project. The Library will provide craft supplies and the opportunity to learn new arts and crafts skills. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Art Club on May 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Clubs.

item.title: A Walk in the Arts - 05/20/2026 4:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Take “A Walk in the Arts” at Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Wednesday, May 20 from 4:00 to 5:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Learn about a different famous artist each month and create a piece of art inspired by what you discover. Projects designed for children in second through fourth grade. Registration is not required. For more information please visit www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: A Walk in the Arts on May 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include children and community.

item.title: AJ Heavenly Pizza Fundraiser - 05/20/2026 4:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Please come to the fundraiser at AJ's Pizza - good food for a good cause. Thank you!
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: AJ Heavenly Pizza Fundraiser on May 20, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include fundraiser and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Jim Wahlberg - A Redemptive Life Story - 05/20/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 1015 Race St, Clyde, OH 43410, USA Jim offers a passionate and personal testimony of his redemptive life from being an imprisoned drug addicted adolescent to encountering one of the greatest saints of all time at his lowest point, ultimately turning his life around. Join us at the Clyde High School Auditorium 6:00 pm Doors open 6:30 Pm - 7:30 PM Speaking 7:30 PM - 8:00 PM Book signing and refreshments
item.dc:creator: Mental Health and Recovery Services Board of Seneca, Ottawa, Sandusky and Wyandot
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Jim Wahlberg - A Redemptive Life Story on May 20, 2026 in Clyde, OH. Featured themes include clyde, ohio and mental health.

item.title: Bible Study in Acts - 05/20/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/20/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us at 6pm Wednesday Nights for Bible Study through the book of Acts. Everyone is welcome. Childcare is not provided. Contact us with any questions.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bible Study in Acts on May 20, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include childcare not provided and fostoria church.

item.title: MST Food Truck - 05/21/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/21/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 182 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA MST Food Truck will be in the front parking lot of St. Francis Home on Thursday, May 21st from 10am-2pm. Come out and get some good eats!
item.dc:creator: St. Francis Senior Ministries
item.yodel:media_alt_text: MST Food Truck on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include good eats and senior ministries.

item.title: Storytime - 05/21/2026 11:45am EDT to 05/21/2026 12:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Storytime on May 21, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include stories and storytime.

item.title: 2026 Art in the Park: Plein Air Gatherings - 05/21/2026 2:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Aeraland Recreational Area, 1220 Township Rd 243, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Plein Air Gatherings are an opportunity for artists to get together and paint or draw outdoors “en plein air” in Hancock County parks. All adult artists who use any medium conducive to working outdoors are welcome. If you are new to plein air painting or are hesitant to go out on your own, these gatherings are a perfect opportunity to meet and work with other plein air artists. Please join us for our 13th season! You should plan to bring whatever supplies and equipment you need and dress for ground and weather conditions. There is no fee or registration. It is not necessary to attend every session – come when you can. In case of rain, the session is cancelled. Gatherings will be held weekly on Thursdays. For more information or questions, please contact volunteer coordinator Sharon Hammer Baker at bakerartstudio@gmail.com or HPD Program Specialist Tim Kleman at tkleman@hancockparks.com.
item.dc:creator: Hancock Park District
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Art in the Park: Plein Air Gatherings on May 21, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include art supplies and community.

item.title: Brick Builders Club - 05/21/2026 4:30pm EDT to 05/21/2026 5:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Brick Builders Club is Open to All Ages; Families are Encouraged to Attend Together. No Registration is Required & You Do Not Need to Make Every Meeting to be Part of the Club!
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Brick Builders Club on May 21, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include no registration required and open to all ages.

item.title: Barking Lot Party - Third Thursday in Downtown Tiffin - 05/21/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for a paw-some evening in Downtown Tiffin on Thursday, May 21, 2026, from 5 to 8 PM! Enjoy a pet-friendly night out with your furry friends as you stroll through downtown and discover a pet-friendly experience throughout the downtown district. Stay tuned for more details and a list of participating businesses! If your dog is aggressive toward other dogs, children, or strangers, we kindly ask that you leave them at home. All dogs must be leashed, and owners are responsible for bringing doggie bags and cleaning up after their pets. Mark your calendars and plan to join us for a fun and pet-friendly evening in Downtown Tiffin!
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Barking Lot Party - Third Thursday in Downtown Tiffin on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and aggressive dogs.

item.title: TU Comes to You: Cincinnati - 05/21/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come reconnect with fellow alumni and friends for a fun and relaxed evening at one of Cincinnati’s most iconic breweries. For $35 per person, your registration includes a guided brewery tour, delicious food, and a pint while you catch up with the TU community and hear the latest updates from campus. Whether you’re looking to reconnect with old friends, meet fellow Dragons in the area, or simply enjoy a great night out, this is an event you won’t want to miss. Space is limited, so be sure to reserve your spot today! Date: May 21, 2026 Time: 6:00 – 8:00 p.m. Location: Rhinegeist Brewery 1910 Elm St. Cincinnati, OH 45202 Register at http://tiffin.edu/.../events/tu-comes-to-you-cincinnati/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University Alumni & Friends
item.yodel:media_alt_text: TU Comes to You: Cincinnati on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Lifestyle and alumni.

item.title: Little Dreamers Pajama Storytime - 05/21/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Little Dreamers Pajama Storytime” on Thursday, May 21 at 6:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Kids age birth to 3 years old and their families are invited to wear their favorite pajamas, bring a stuffed animal, and enjoy bedtime stories, songs and a relaxing wind-down before bed. For more information, please stop by the Junior Library or call (419) 447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Little Dreamers Pajama Storytime on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include families and pajama storytime.

item.title: End of Year Celebration for Lincoln Pre-K - 05/21/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/21/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 113 Melmore St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come join your team to create your own personalized wood project. It will be a fun night out while the girls practice! Select a doormat or a small or large door hanger.
item.dc:creator: Rustic Flair & Brush
item.yodel:media_alt_text: End of Year Celebration for Lincoln Pre-K on May 21, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and end of year celebration.

item.title: Dino Dance Party - 05/22/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/22/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will present a “Dino Dance Party” on Friday, May 22 at 10:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Children age five and under are invited to join a prehistoric party packed with dinosaur-themed songs that will have everyone on their feet. Fun props such as shaky eggs, colorful scarves, and more will be provided. Feel free to dress up like a dinosaur or just bring your best moves! For more information, call 419-447-3751, or go online to www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Dino Dance Party on May 22, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and Music & Entertainment.

item.title: Outdoor Adventure Day - 05/23/2026 9:00am EDT to 05/23/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 3570 N County Rd 33, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Tiffin Scout Troop 499 for Outdoor Adventure Day at the Izaak Walton League of America! There will be demonstrations by Tiffin Scout Troop 499 and ODNR as well as Fishing, Shooting, Archery & Food. All ages are welcome. This is a drop in event, no registration required.

item.title: Trailer Trash Chris - 05/23/2026 7:00pm EDT to 05/23/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 11295 OH-18, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA 🚨 THIS ONE IS GONNA BE CRAZY 🚨 Venue 18 is about to go OFF when National Recording Artist Seckond Chaynce pulls up and shuts it down! 🎤🔥 With over 100+ MILLION streams and the smash hit “My World” sitting at 50+ MILLION streams, this is NOT a show you wanna hear about after the fact… this is one you need to be in the building for 💯 If you know Seckond Chaynce, then you already know — versatile, high energy, real music, real talent. If you don’t know yet… this is your chance to find out LIVE 😤 📍 Venue 18 11295 OH-18 Fostoria, Ohio 44830 🗓 May 23rd 🚪 Doors: 6PM 🎶 Show: 7PM 🎧 DJ Trailer Trash Chris 🎧 DJ Drippy 🔥 Tour Support: Rylan Partaka 🔥 Special Performances by Ohio’s own Brian Durst “Mr. Nobody” and more TBA 🔥 🎟 Tickets: $25 Pre-Sale $30 At The Door $50 Meet N Greets ⚠ Don’t wait till the last minute. ⚠ Don’t be the one asking who all went. ⚠ Don’t miss this one. TAG YOUR CREW. SHARE THIS. LET’S PACK VENUE 18 AND MAKE THIS A MOVIE!! 🔥🔥🔥 #419 See less
item.dc:creator: Venue 18
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Trailer Trash Chris on May 23, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include national recording artist and special performances.

item.title: 9:30am Sunday School 10:30am Church - 05/24/2026 9:30am EDT to 05/24/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA 9:30am-10:30am Sunday School Classes for Toddlers, Kids, Youth, and Adults on Sunday mornings that study the Bible and talk about applying it to our lives. 10:30am Worship followed by Sunday Service. 10:50am Online, worship at home and join us on Facebook or YouTube at 10:50am live, or watch later at your convenience.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 9:30am Sunday School 10:30am Church on May 24, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include sunday school and toddlers.

item.title: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study - 05/25/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/25/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for Celebrate Recovery Bible Study Monday nights at 6pm. A group for everyone, as we deal with the hurts, hang ups, and habits in life. Bring your family, friends, and neighbors. A time of Bible Study, sharing life, and fellowship. No childcare is provided.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study on May 25, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include sharing life and Religious.

item.title: Mobile Mammography - 05/26/2026 12:00am EDT to 05/26/2026 1:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 1344 W Seneca Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Mercy Health Mobile Mammography Van provides services for easier access to quality care in a safe, convenient environment. The mobile unit uses the same newest high-quality 3D technology, including patient assisted compression, allowing you to control the amount of pressure once in position for your mammogram, allowing for a more comfortable experience.
item.dc:creator: Mercy Health - Defiance Hospital
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Mobile Mammography on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include mobile mammography and patient assisted compression.

item.dc:creator: Mercy Health

item.title: The Tragic End - presented by Mike Gilbert - 05/26/2026 10:30am EDT to 05/26/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tragic End: The Assassination of Robert F Kennedy - Mike Gilbert is a very interesting speaker. Please call Allen Eiry Center at (419) 448-9774 to save a seat.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: The Tragic End - presented by Mike Gilbert on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include assassination of robert f kennedy and mike gilbert.

item.title: Seneca County Safety Council | May Meeting - 05/26/2026 12:00pm EDT to 05/26/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 928 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the Seneca County Safety Council May meeting on May 26, 2026 at 12:00 PM at the North Central Ohio Educational Service Center. Ed Scheeter will present "Motorcycle Awareness and Road Safety," in recognition of Motorcycle Awareness Month, focusing on shared road safety and driver awareness. If you are bringing a guest, please register them no later than May 19 at www.SenecaRegionalChamber.com/guest.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca County Safety Council | May Meeting on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include road safety and safety council.

item.title: Teen Tuesday - 05/26/2026 3:00pm EDT to 05/26/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA “Teen Tuesdays” will be returning to the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library every Tuesday from 3:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room beginning Tuesday, September 2. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly afterschool hangout for games, snacks, crafts and more. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Kids & Family.

item.title: Teen Tuesday - 05/26/2026 3:00pm EDT to 05/26/2026 4:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA “Teen Tuesdays” will be returning to the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library every Tuesday from 3:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room beginning Tuesday, September 2. Teens in grades 6 through 12 are invited to a weekly afterschool hangout for games, snacks, crafts and more. For more information, log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Kids & Family.

item.title: Trivia Tuesday: Music - 05/26/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/26/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Trivia Tuesday,” an adult trivia night on Tuesday, May 26 from 6:00 to 8:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Join us for an evening of fun, facts, and friendly competition. Teams will battle it out over six exciting rounds designed to test your knowledge about music. Prizes for the winning team include a custom 3D-printed trophy made right here at the Library. This free program is open to both adults and teens. Space is limited so registration is required by visiting the online calendar at www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org. For more information, please call (419) 447-3751 or log onto www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Trivia Tuesday: Music on May 26, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Music & Entertainment and adult trivia night.

item.title: Collaborative Luncheon | May - 05/27/2026 11:30am EDT to 05/27/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 248 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Welcome to the Seneca County Collaborative Luncheon series, where you have a seat at the table for a gathering filled with networking, education, promotion, and impact. On the menu… Date & Time: Wednesday, May 27, 2026 11:30 AM: Doors Open 11:30 AM - 12 PM: Networking 12 PM - 1 PM: Program Location: Tiffin University’s Marion Center Featured Speaker: Elected Officials Topic: Legislative Lunch Registration: $25 for members and non-members Our luncheon series is designed to provide a comprehensive experience that embodies the mission of the Collaborative and allows our organization to best serve you. Reserve your seat today at: https://senecaregionalchamberofcommerceoh.growthzoneapp.c... Experience the Collaborative one bite at a time. See you at the luncheon!
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Collaborative Luncheon | May on May 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Business and Government.

item.title: Craft Creation—Rock Painting - 05/27/2026 2:00pm EDT to 05/27/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 701 E County Rd 6 #6, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Everyone needs a rock—a special rock.  Join Linda Rose as we pick and choose a favorite rock and then paint it to your liking, Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Craft Creation—Rock Painting on May 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include rock painting and special rock.

item.title: Permanent Jewelry Pop Up - 05/27/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/27/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 138 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at Empire for a special Permanent Jewelry Pop-Up with Linked by Savannah. Stop in anytime from 5–8 PM to get linked with a custom-fit piece you can wear every day. Choose your chain, get sized, and have it welded on for a seamless, clasp-free finish. We’re pairing the experience with our regular Wine Wednesday, featuring $5 house pours all evening, making it the perfect midweek outing. No appointments needed—this is a first come, first served pop-up. We recommend arriving early to ensure availability. Grab your friends, sip some wine, and treat yourself to something permanent.
item.dc:creator: The Empire Bistro
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Permanent Jewelry Pop Up on May 27, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include custom-fit and midweek outing.

item.title: Bible Study in Acts - 05/27/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/27/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us at 6pm Wednesday Nights for Bible Study through the book of Acts. Everyone is welcome. Childcare is not provided. Contact us with any questions.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bible Study in Acts on May 27, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria, ohio and wednesday nights.

item.title: Wetland Walkers - 05/28/2026 8:30am EDT to 05/28/2026 9:30am EDT
item.description: Location : Fruth Wetland Nature Preserve, 10130 OH-18, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for a guided morning walk through the wetlands. Enjoy fresh air, light conversation, and a chance to experience the natural beauty of the preserve. This program is great for adults looking to stay active and connected with nature. Registration is required for those who would like to place a coffee order (optional $5 donation for coffee).
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Wetland Walkers on May 28, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include Outdoors and active.

item.title: Storytime - 05/28/2026 11:45am EDT to 05/28/2026 12:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Story Time is best suited for almost 3 year-olds through Kindergarten, lasts for 45-60 minutes, and includes stories, songs, extension activities & a craft.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Storytime on May 28, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include storytime and Kids & Family.

item.title: Cinema & Slice - 05/28/2026 5:00pm EDT to 05/28/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Cinema & Slice” for teens in grades six through twelve on Thursday, May 28 from 5:00 to 7:00 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Teens are invited to join the Library for pizza and a suspense-filled interactive movie experience featuring the 2025 sequel based on a video game where animatronics come to life. The title of this PG-13 movie can be found on the Library’s website. For more information, please visit the online calendar at www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org or call 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Cinema & Slice on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include video game and Film.

item.title: Family Movie Night - 05/28/2026 5:30pm EDT to 05/28/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Join us for Family Movie Night! Bring your dinner, favorite blanket or camp chair & get comfy! Folding chair seating and popcorn provided! See what's showing by visiting our website https://www.senecaeastlibrary.org/.../family-movie-night-14.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Movie Night on May 28, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include popcorn and public library.

item.title: How to Read a Book Like a Professor: Follow-Up Discussion - 05/28/2026 6:00pm EDT to 05/28/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA **PLEASE NOTE THE DATE AND LOCATION CHANGE As part of the 2026 Christopher D. English Community Read, Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “How to Read a Book Like a Professor: Follow-Up Discussion” on Thursday, May 28 at 6:00 p.m. in the Junior Home Room. Heidelberg Professor Dr. Barry Devine will return to the Library to lead a discussion on The Astral Library. This program explores the novel and reflect on Dr. Devine’s earlier session, discussing how his tips and techniques influenced the reading experience. The Community Read features a series of special programs to honor the book The Astral Library by Kate Quinn. Each year the Community Read encourages people in Seneca County to read the selected title and come together for special events and discussions. As the featured event in the Community Read, Kate Quinn, a New York Times best-selling author, will speak to the community on Tuesday, April 28 at 6:30 p.m. at the Chandelier Community Event Center. The author event is completely free and open to the community and will be followed by a book signing. Copies of The Astral Library will be available for purchase thanks to the Pan Yan Bookstore. Information about additional programs and the 2026 Community Read can be found at www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/community-read.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: How to Read a Book Like a Professor: Follow-Up Discussion on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include best-selling author and book signing.

item.title: Seneca Proud Book Club - 05/28/2026 6:30pm EDT to 05/28/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 137 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Book club is open to everyone, even if you haven't finished reading the book yet. Books are available at Pan Yan Bookstore in downtown Tiffin and also through the public library.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Proud
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca Proud Book Club on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include reading and seneca proud.

item.title: "Birch Trees and Path" Thursday, May 28, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #05282601 or #05282602 - 05/28/2026 9:00pm EDT to 05/29/2026 12:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Friday, May 22. Paint "Birch Trees and Path" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Thursday, May 28 from 9am until 12 pm or from 6pm-9pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 11"x14" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Birch Trees and Path" Thursday, May 28, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #05282601 or #05282602 on May 28, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include birch trees and path and Arts.

item.title: Ohio Rural Business Initiative - 05/29/2026 10:00am EDT to 05/29/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the U.S. Small Business Administration for the Ohio Rural Business Initiative, an in person event designed to support rural based small businesses across all industries. This session will focus on helping businesses understand available resources, access capital, and connect directly with agencies and partners working to support rural economic growth. Is your rural business ready for the next level? The Ohio Rural Business Initiative brings together the SBA and partner organizations to share tools, funding opportunities, and guidance tailored specifically for rural businesses. Attendees will learn what programs are available, how to navigate funding options step by step, and how different agencies are working together to support business growth in rural communities. This is also a great opportunity to connect with officials, resource providers, and fellow rural business owners who are navigating similar challenges and opportunities.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ohio Rural Business Initiative on May 29, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include funding opportunities and rural business.

item.title: Veterans, Active Military, and First Responders Resource Fair - 05/29/2026 11:30am EDT to 05/29/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Veterans, Active Military, First Responders, bring your family and come to our resource fair on Friday, May 29, 2026 and receive a meal, participate in our raffle, and walk through the fair among resources and vendors! We are here to help you and want to thank you! We will be at the Fostoria Learning Center. 342 Perry Street Fostoria, Ohio
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Veterans, Active Military, and First Responders Resource Fair on May 29, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include veterans and Causes.
